Our innovative Capital Markets solutions and Insurance solutions empower clients to optimize collateral workflows and enhance insurance processes with unmatched efficiency.

As a renowned global provider of software solutions for the financial services industry, we seek individuals with a passion for technology and a commitment to excellence. Learn more about joining Vermeg ##### Explore Vermeg career opportunities Your aspirations are just the starting point. Tap into our worldwide reach, cutting-edge technology, and collaborative culture to unlock your full potential. Immerse yourself in an environment where you can learn from the best, engage with the inquisitive, pose insightful questions, and contribute to shaping the professional world. Craft your own exceptional Vermeg experience. The opportunity is yours to shape. Explore jobs ##### Find the right job posting Interested in Vermeg but haven’t found the right posting? Then join our talent community. We’ll match you with upcoming opportunities that align with your specific skill set and mindset. Join Vermeg's talent community Work at Vermeg ##### What’s it like to work at Vermeg? ##### Drive innovation in financial services At Vermeg, innovation is not just a goal; it’s a guiding principle. Our teams worldwide consistently push boundaries, set new standards, and shape the future of financial technology, positioning us at the forefront of technological progress within the financial services sector. Working at Vermeg, you’ll tap into a genuine culture of creativity where people are empowered to think outside the box and develop solutions that redefine the industry. ##### Uniting global expertise, bridging boundaries Vermeg’s global footprint is not just a physical presence but a testament to our commitment to fostering a dynamic, interconnected workplace that thrives on diversity and collaboration. Joining Vermeg, you’ll become an integral part of a team that seamlessly collaborates across borders. Manifested through our strategic establishment of offices in pivotal financial hubs worldwide, this international synergy enriches our collective expertise and consistently yields exceptional results. ##### Empowering careers We don’t just invest in careers; we invest in our team members’ enduring success and growth. At the core of Vermeg’s organizational ethos lies a performance-driven culture bolstered by the conviction that continuous learning is the bedrock of success. As such, career development at Vermeg is more than a promise; it’s a commitment to nurturing professional growth. We provide ongoing development opportunities, enabling our team members to evolve beyond their roles by providing them with the necessary skills, knowledge, and experiences to excel in their careers. ##### Elevating your expertise with Vermeg Academy Continuous learning is seamlessly integrated into the Vermeg experience through Vermeg Academy. By combining a spirit of perpetual growth with insights into international business trends, technical innovations, and personal development, Vermeg Academy goes beyond conventional training. Moreover, every employee in every country where we operate has access to Vermeg Academy. ##### Unity in diversity At Vermeg, inclusion and diversity are not checkboxes; they are the heartbeat of our culture, the essence of who we are and the strength that propels us forward. Working at Vermeg means working in an environment where everyone feels seen, heard, and valued. We champion an inclusive workplace where diverse voices, backgrounds, and perspectives converge to create a rich tapestry of ideas and innovations, celebrating differences to deliver collective success. ##### Your best self, in all facets of life Empowering you for professional success means empowering you to thrive in all aspects of your life. At Vermeg, we believe in creating workplaces that promote productivity through well-being. Our commitment is not just to tasks and deadlines but to fostering an environment that values the personal lives of all our team members. Vermeg stories ##### We are Vermeg stories Vermeg individuals’ stories, experiences, and influence extend beyond borders, functions, and cultures. Vermeg’s team ##### Become a valued member of our team We embrace the potential of innovation and teamwork. As a renowned global provider of software solutions for the financial services industry, we seek individuals with a passion for technology and a commitment to excellence. Learn more about joining Vermeg ##### Explore Vermeg career opportunities Your aspirations are just the starting point. Tap into our worldwide reach, cutting-edge technology, and collaborative culture to unlock your full potential. Immerse yourself in an environment where you can learn from the best, engage with the inquisitive, pose insightful questions, and contribute to shaping the professional world. Craft your own exceptional Vermeg experience. The opportunity is yours to shape. Explore jobs ##### Find the right job posting Interested in Vermeg but haven’t found the right posting? Then join our talent community. We’ll match you with upcoming opportunities that align with your specific skill set and mindset. Join Vermeg's talent community Work at Vermeg ##### What’s it like to work at Vermeg? ##### Drive innovation in financial services At Vermeg, innovation is not just a goal; it’s a guiding principle. Our teams worldwide consistently push boundaries, set new standards, and shape the future of financial technology, positioning us at the forefront of technological progress within the financial services sector. Working at Vermeg, you’ll tap into a genuine culture of creativity where people are empowered to think outside the box and develop solutions that redefine the industry. ##### Uniting global expertise, bridging boundaries Vermeg’s global footprint is not just a physical presence but a testament to our commitment to fostering a dynamic, interconnected workplace that thrives on diversity and collaboration. Joining Vermeg, you’ll become an integral part of a team that seamlessly collaborates across borders. Manifested through our strategic establishment of offices in pivotal financial hubs worldwide, this international synergy enriches our collective expertise and consistently yields exceptional results. ##### Empowering careers We don’t just invest in careers; we invest in our team members’ enduring success and growth. At the core of Vermeg’s organizational ethos lies a performance-driven culture bolstered by the conviction that continuous learning is the bedrock of success. As such, career development at Vermeg is more than a promise; it’s a commitment to nurturing professional growth. We provide ongoing development opportunities, enabling our team members to evolve beyond their roles by providing them with the necessary skills, knowledge, and experiences to excel in their careers. ##### Elevating your expertise with Vermeg Academy Continuous learning is seamlessly integrated into the Vermeg experience through Vermeg Academy. By combining a spirit of perpetual growth with insights into international business trends, technical innovations, and personal development, Vermeg Academy goes beyond conventional training. Moreover, every employee in every country where we operate has access to Vermeg Academy. ##### Unity in diversity At Vermeg, inclusion and diversity are not checkboxes; they are the heartbeat of our culture, the essence of who we are and the strength that propels us forward. Working at Vermeg means working in an environment where everyone feels seen, heard, and valued. We champion an inclusive workplace where diverse voices, backgrounds, and perspectives converge to create a rich tapestry of ideas and innovations, celebrating differences to deliver collective success. ##### Your best self, in all facets of life Empowering you for professional success means empowering you to thrive in all aspects of your life. At Vermeg, we believe in creating workplaces that promote productivity through well-being. Our commitment is not just to tasks and deadlines but to fostering an environment that values the personal lives of all our team members.

Vermeg stories ##### We are Vermeg stories Vermeg individuals’ stories, experiences, and influence extend beyond borders, functions, and cultures. Overview Overview Recognitions Who we serve Resources Overview ##### Enabling resilient, efficient, and transparent market infrastructure operations Market infrastructures operate at the center of the financial ecosystem, ensuring the safe transfer of cash and securities, the integrity of settlement processes, and the efficient management of collateral and liquidity. With accelerating settlement cycles, increased clearing volumes, and higher expectations for transparency, Central Banks, CSDs, CCPs, and market intermediaries need solutions built around stability, automation, and regulatory alignment. Vermeg provides platforms that strengthen the post-trade lifecycle, covering collateral and liquidity management, cash and securities settlement, default management, asset servicing, and referential data, ensuring regulatory compliance. Link Copy Link to Clipboard News Eurex joins Clearstream & VERMEG partnership ###### 2024-05-15 - Paris Eurex joins partnership with software provider VERMEG to offer clients a unique collateral management solution connecting the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) , Clearstream’s Triparty services and Eurex’s GC Pooling. This partnership will provide new opportunities for collateral optimization via the re-use of collateral to increase clients’ Central Bank Credit Line within the new ECMS. Eurex, Europe’s leading derivatives exchange, and VERMEG, the technology provider of the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS), enter a partnership which will enable banks with new opportunities to further optimize collateral re-use. ##### / Leading pan-European cash-driven liquidity pool GC Pooling is the leading pan-European cash-driven liquidity pool for secured funding with more than 160 buy and sell side firms. It ensures straight-through processing with automated connectivity to Eurex Clearing as a central counterparty and real time collateral management services provided by Deutsche Börse’s post-trade business Clearstream. ##### / Collateral re-use opportunities and central bank liquidity Implementation of ECMS in November 2024 will provide new opportunities for collateral optimization and mobilization in the Eurozone through GC Pooling re-use. This includes seamless refinancing with national central banks, collateralization of CCP margin, and collateralization of bilateral margin. The ECB is using the ECMS to harmonize the collateral management practices of national central banks across the Eurozone. Leveraging VERMEG’s collateral solution, Eurex’s clients will benefit from enhanced liquidity management and collateral optimization. VERMEG’s Easy Collateral is a digital and cloud-based plug and play platform to monitor, optimize and process collateral operations. The increased efficiency in collateral operations is also enhanced by the STP Triparty offer by Clearstream& VERMEG. ##### / Close collaboration between Eurex, Clearsteam and VERMEG Frank Gast, Member of the Management Board of Eurex Repo : “A unified approach to Eurosystem Collateral Management will ultimately standardize collateral management across the Eurozone, advancing liquidity, market reliability and automation potential. Our ambition is to provide innovative and best-in-class solutions to the markets and our clients. With the help of this new partnership, we will be able to realize the potential of the ECMS for all market participants and emphasize the importance of access to central bank money. Time is now for clients to prepare implementation of ECMS and to benefit from new collateral optimization opportunities.” Michael Cariginano, Head of Markets Innovation at VERMEG : “We are thrilled to expand our longstanding partnership with Clearstream to include a key player like Eurex. As the foremost provider of Collateral Management solutions for Central Banks, VERMEG is committed to empowering banks to seamlessly connect with market infrastructure, including Central Banks, Triparty Agents, and CCPs. Together, VERMEG, Clearstream, and Eurex are forging a groundbreaking solution that will allow banks to optimize collateral allocation and leverage the most efficient operational setup. Through direct connectivity to ECMS and Clearstream, coupled with full access to collateral re-use capabilities facilitated by GC Pooling at Eurex, banks will enjoy unparalleled efficiency and flexibility in managing their collateral assets.” ##### / About VERMEG VERMEG is a specialized software house covering three main market segments in financial services: Collateral management & Asset Servicing, Regulatory reporting and Digital transformation and is the global leading provider of collateral management solutions for Central Banks. VERMEG’s solutions and Innovation are designed to address the transformation challenges of the Market-Infrastructure industry. For more information, please visit: EASY Collateral by VERMEG. ##### / About Eurex Eurex is the leading European derivatives exchange and – with Eurex Clearing – one of the leading central counterparties globally. As architects of trusted markets characterized by market liquidity, efficiency, and integrity, we provide our customers with innovative solutions to seamlessly manage risk. ###### Press Contact: VERMEG Donia Sahli Email: dsahli@vermeg.com Website: www.vermeg.com Mobile: +216 29 900 314 Eurex Irmgard Thiessen Mobile: +49 (69) 211 15911 Email: irmgard.thiessen@deutsche-boerse.com Fabian Vichtl Mobile: +49 (69) 211 16595 Email:fabian.vichtl@deutsche-boerse.com ###### Related articles VERMEG and IDClear Join Forces to Bring CCP February 4, 2025 Learn more Comment être un pilier de la stabilité financière February 4, 2025 Learn more Regnology acquires VERMEG’s regulatory reporting business February 4, 2025 Learn more References VERMEG & Clearstream partnership. News Eurex joins Clearstream & VERMEG partnership ###### 2024-05-15 - Paris **Eurex** joins partnership with software provider **VERMEG** to offer clients a unique collateral management solution connecting the **Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS)** , Clearstream’s Triparty services and Eurex’s GC Pooling. This partnership will provide new opportunities for c**ollateral optimization** via the re-use of collateral to increase clients’ **Central Bank Credit** **Line** within the new **ECMS**. Eurex, Europe’s leading derivatives exchange, and VERMEG, the technology provider of the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS), enter a partnership which will enable banks with new opportunities to further optimize collateral re-use. ##### / Leading pan-European cash-driven liquidity pool GC Pooling is the leading pan-European cash-driven liquidity pool for secured funding with more than 160 buy and sell side firms. It ensures straight-through processing with automated connectivity to Eurex Clearing as a central counterparty and real time collateral management services provided by Deutsche Börse’s post-trade business Clearstream. ##### / Collateral re-use opportunities and central bank liquidity Implementation of ECMS in November 2024 will provide new opportunities for collateral optimization and mobilization in the Eurozone through GC Pooling re-use. This includes seamless refinancing with national central banks, collateralization of CCP margin, and collateralization of bilateral margin. The ECB is using the ECMS to harmonize the collateral management practices of national central banks across the Eurozone. Leveraging VERMEG’s collateral solution, Eurex’s clients will benefit from enhanced liquidity management and collateral optimization. VERMEG’s Easy Collateral is a digital and cloud-based plug and play platform to monitor, optimize and process collateral operations. The increased efficiency in collateral operations is also enhanced by the STP Triparty offer by **Clearstream& VERMEG.** ##### / Close collaboration between Eurex, Clearsteam and VERMEG **Frank Gast, Member of the Management Board of Eurex Repo** : _“A unified approach to Eurosystem Collateral Management will ultimately standardize collateral management across the Eurozone, advancing liquidity, market reliability and automation potential. Our ambition is to provide innovative and best-in-class solutions to the markets and our clients. With the help of this new partnership, we will be able to realize the potential of the ECMS for all market participants and emphasize the importance of access to central bank money. Time is now for clients to prepare implementation of ECMS and to benefit from new collateral optimization opportunities.”_ **Michael Cariginano, Head of Markets Innovation at VERMEG** : _“We are thrilled to expand our longstanding partnership with Clearstream to include a key player like Eurex. As the foremost provider of Collateral Management solutions for Central Banks, VERMEG is committed to empowering banks to seamlessly connect with market infrastructure, including Central Banks, Triparty Agents, and CCPs. Together, VERMEG, Clearstream, and Eurex are forging a groundbreaking solution that will allow banks to optimize collateral allocation and leverage the most efficient operational setup. Through direct connectivity to ECMS and Clearstream, coupled with full access to collateral re-use capabilities facilitated by GC Pooling at Eurex, banks will enjoy unparalleled efficiency and flexibility in managing their collateral assets.”_ ##### / About VERMEG VERMEG is a specialized software house covering three main market segments in financial services: Collateral management & Asset Servicing, Regulatory reporting and Digital transformation and is the global leading provider of collateral management solutions for Central Banks. VERMEG’s solutions and Innovation are designed to address the transformation challenges of the Market-Infrastructure industry. For more information, please visit: **EASY Collateral by VERMEG**. ##### / About Eurex Eurex is the leading European derivatives exchange and – with Eurex Clearing – one of the leading central counterparties globally. As architects of trusted markets characterized by market liquidity, efficiency, and integrity, we provide our customers with innovative solutions to seamlessly manage risk. ###### Press Contact: **VERMEG** **Donia Sahli** **Email:** dsahli@vermeg.com **Website:** www.vermeg.com **Mobile:** +216 29 900 314 **Eurex** **Irmgard Thiessen** **Mobile:** +49 (69) 211 15911 **Email:** irmgard.thiessen@deutsche-boerse.com **Fabian Vichtl** **Mobile:** +49 (69) 211 16595 **Email:**fabian.vichtl@deutsche-boerse.com ###### Related articles VERMEG and IDClear Join Forces to Bring CCP * February 4, 2025 Learn more Comment être un pilier de la stabilité financière * February 4, 2025 Learn more Regnology acquires VERMEG’s regulatory reporting business * February 4, 2025 Learn more References VERMEG & Clearstream partnership. **Click here** To know more about EASY Collateral for ECB: **Click here** Share on
